script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
High performers don't have more willpower. They have better rhythms.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
You think you're lazy. Or undisciplined.
You try harder, push through, burn out.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
The most productive people work WITH their energy.
Hard tasks in the first 4 hours after waking.
Admin and easy stuff in the dip.

[TIP 18-24s]
Move your most important work to the first 3 hours of your day.
Don't fight your rhythm — use it.

[CTA 24-30s]
VOLT Sleep helps you find your rhythm. Free. Link in bio.
caption: ** It's not discipline. It's timing. When do you do your hardest work?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Stop optimizing your morning. Fix your evening first.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
Everyone obsesses over morning routines.
Cold showers. Journaling. Meditation.
But if your evening is chaos, your morning won't matter.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
Your morning energy is decided the night before.
Screen time, caffeine timing, and wind-down routine
set up tomorrow's focus.

[TIP 18-24s]
One rule: dim your lights and stop screens 60 minutes before bed.
That's it.

[CTA 24-30s]
Link in bio — free energy profile in 30 seconds.
caption: ** Your morning routine doesn't matter if your evening is broken. What's your pre-bed screen time?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
The 45-second habit that doubled my afternoon focus.

[PROBLEM 2-6s]
I used to lose every afternoon.
2 PM hit and my brain was gone.

[REFRAME 6-16s]
I started doing a 45-second check-in with myself.
"How's my energy? What did I do this morning?"
Just awareness — no action needed.

[TIP 16-22s]
Set a reminder at 2 PM. Rate your energy 1-10.
After 7 days you'll know your pattern.

[CTA 22-28s]
I built an app that does this check-in for you. Free. 30 seconds.
caption: ** 45 seconds changed my afternoon. All I did was start noticing. What's your 2 PM energy?
